data.title: Texas community bank reinvents itself as crypto-focused lender
data.description:
Monet Bank in Texas has become a crypto-focused lender serving cryptocurrency and digital-asset businesses.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/texas-bank-reinvents-itself-in-crypto/

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Predicts Survival of Bitcoin and Ethereum Amid Altcoin Decline
data.description: According to PANews, renowned investor Kevin O'Leary has expressed skepticism about the long-term viability of most altcoins, asserting that they are essentially worthless and will eventually disappear. O'Leary believes that only Bitcoin and Ethereum possess the necessary attributes to endure in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Indian Crypto Investors Are Finally Moving Beyond Bitcoin, New Survey Reveals
data.description:
A new industry survey indicates that India’s crypto market is moving past a “Bitcoin-only” mindset, with investors showing broader diversification, deeper engagement, and higher levels of market maturity.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/indian-crypto-investors-are-finally-moving-beyond-bitcoin-new-survey-reveals/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Slides Below $90,000 – Is A Retest Of The November Lows Near?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) is retesting a crucial support area after its price slid 5% from the recent highs and fell below the $90,000 barrier. Some analysts have suggested that the cryptocurrency’s structure remains intact, but warned that it must bounce quickly or risk retesting the November lows. Related Reading: XRP ETFs Record 13-Day Streak As SOL Funds See Largest Outflows Since Launch Bitcoin Retests $88,000 After Rejection On Friday, Bitcoin lost the recently reclaimed $90,000 level, falling to a key support area before stabilizing. The flagship crypto has been attempting to recover from the November market correction, which sent its price to a seven-month low of $80,600
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-price-slides-below-90000-is-a-retest-of-the-november-lows-near/

data.title: Significant Altcoin Withdrawal Linked to Investor Jez San
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, analyst Emmett Gallic shared on the X platform that an address associated with prominent investor Jez San has withdrawn over $75 million in altcoins from an exchange. The assets include $22 million in LINK, $18 million in ETH, $11 million in ENA, $6 million in AAVE, $3.75 million in ONDO, $3.5 million in PENDLE, $3.3 million in UNI, and $1.3 million in ARB.

data.description:
The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission has released an updated agenda for its December 15 roundtable focused on cryptocurrency, financial surveillance, and digital privacy. The event will bring together senior SEC officials and leading figures from the blockchain sector, including Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox, to examine how regulatory policy should adapt to rapidly evolving privacy […] The post SEC Updates Agenda for Dec
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sec-updates-agenda-for-dec-15-crypto-roundtable-on-surveillance-and-privacy/

data.title: Strive calls on MSCI to rethink its ‘unworkable’ Bitcoin blacklist
data.description:
Strive CEO Matt Cole has urged the MSCI to “let the market decide” whether they want to include Bitcoin-holding companies in their passive investments.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/msci-exclusion-btc-firms-is-unworkable-strive-ceo?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase-Backed Base Claims It Can “Flip” Solana, Sees Pushback
data.description:
Key Insights Base chain by Coinbase ignited fresh debate as reported in crypto news on December 4, 2025. This occurred even as a Solana bridge launch secured by Chainlink’s CCIP was announced. The bridge enables seamless asset transfers between the ecosystems
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/12/05/coinbase-backed-base-claims-it-can-flip-solana-sees-pushback/

data.title: Polymarket Data Indicates High Probability of Fed Rate Cut in December
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Polymarket data reveals a 94% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in December. The likelihood of maintaining the current interest rate stands at just 6%, with some users even betting on a 50 basis point cut, which currently has a 1% probability. The trading volume for this prediction event has reached $260 million.

data.title: Crypto Exchange FTX Files for Bankruptcy, Market Reeling
data.description:
FTX's bankruptcy filing impacts crypto market with significant repercussions for BTC and other assets.
source: https://coincu.com/news/ftx-bankruptcy-crypto-market-impact/

data.title: SEC to Host Roundtable on Cryptocurrency, Financial Surveillance, and Privacy
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is set to hold a roundtable discussion on cryptocurrency, financial surveillance, and privacy on December 15. The event will be initiated by senior SEC officials, including Crypto Task Force Director Richard B. Gabbert and Chairman Paul S. Atkins, along with several commissioners.

Key highlights of the meeting include a keynote speech by Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox and a presentation by Aleo Network Foundation CEO Koh. The panel discussion will be moderated by Yaya J. Fanusie, Global Policy Director at Aleo Network Foundation. Participants will feature policy analysts from the American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU), the CEO of the Blockchain Association, and representatives from various privacy technology companies.

data.title: Google hit with annual reset on default search and AI app contracts
data.description:
A judge ruled that Google’s default search and AI contracts must be renewed every year, ending multi-year deals.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-hit-with-annual-reset/

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Cycle Uncertainty as Daan Highlights Deepest Drawdown Yet
data.description:
Bitcoin has just logged its sharpest drawdown of the current cycle, prompting renewed debate about whether the market remains in a standard correction or is signaling a deeper structural shift. Analyst DaanCrypto says the coming months will be pivotal, as the familiar four-year cycle appears intact in timing but questionable in price behavior.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-faces-cycle-uncertainty-as-daan-highlights-deepest-drawdown-yet/

data.title: Grayscale Files for Sui Trust ETF with SEC
data.description: According to PANews, Grayscale has submitted an S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to propose the launch of the Grayscale Sui Trust (SUI) ETF.

data.title: Potential Rebound for Altcoins Amid Shifts in Correlation with Small-Cap Stocks
data.description:
According to Odaily, Delphi Digital has shared insights on the X platform regarding the correlation between the altcoin index Total3 and U.S. small-cap stocks (RUT). Since the beginning of 2024, the long-term correlation has remained around 0.75, indicating that both are influenced by liquidity and risk appetite. However, short-term indicators have shown divergence, with 30-day and 90-day correlations recently dropping to historically low levels, suggesting a temporary loosening of short-term linkage.

Historically, such structures often signal mean reversion, where lagging assets may experience a catch-up rally. If the macroeconomic environment remains favorable and small-cap stocks continue to break through, altcoins might see a rebound.

data.title: Grayscale Sui ETF Application Lacks Verifiable SEC Filing
data.description:
Grayscale's Sui ETF application reportedly filed, but lacks confirmable SEC documentation.
source: https://coincu.com/news/grayscale-sui-etf-sec-filing/

data.title: Tether CEO Criticizes Reliance on Centralized Infrastructure
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO, Paolo Ardoino, expressed concerns on the X platform regarding the recent outage of Cloudflare. He emphasized the need for future technologies to move away from dependence on centralized infrastructure.

data.title: Bitcoin Adoption Is Just Getting Started — 200x Growth Possible, Tom Lee Says
data.description:
Fundstrat’s Tom Lee told attendees at Binance Blockchain Week that he believes the worst leg of the recent crypto slump is likely over and that markets may be ready for a gradual recovery. He pointed to weakening selling pressure and growing underlying activity as reasons for cautious optimism. Related Reading: A New Era Begins: CFTC Approves Spot Bitcoin On Regulated US Markets Market Sentiment May Be Near A Turning Point According to Lee, mood on the street turned darker after October, with many investors showing fatigue after steady losses. He said the current selling looks closer to exhaustion than to the start of another major decline
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-adoption-is-just-getting-started-200x-growth-possible-tom-lee-says/
